{
  "mnemonics": [
    "Mind Your Colors",
    "Colors Transform To Sharpen Images Nicely"
  ],
  "keyPoints": [
    "Image processing is about applying algorithms to images",
    "Color transformations include changes in hue, saturation, and brightness",
    "Smoothing and sharpening are used to enhance image features",
    "Colors are used to segment images into meaningful regions",
    "Noise in color images can be reduced using various techniques"
  ]
